data.name: Femdom Girlfriend 4: Isabelle, The Facesitting Queen
data.detailed_description:
After being bullied and teased by Sophie and Yuki all day, you collapse in your bed and prepare yourself for your session with Isabelle the next day. Among you and your bullies, Isabelle's bullying consists of almost exclusively facesitting and body worship. Because of this, you and your bullies have given her the title of "The Facesitting Queen". Other than Victoria when she's in a good mood, you consider Isabelle the gentlest and least violent by far. But unfortunately for you, (Or fortunately depending on how perverted you are) something seems to have awakened inside Isabelle, something that will make her bullying much much much worse than you thought.

  • ~5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 22 Unique character images

  • 28 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Among you and your bullies, Isabelle's bullying consists of almost exclusively facesitting and body worship. Because of this, you and your bullies have given her the title of "The Facesitting Queen". And today, Isabelle has you all for herself to bully and torment as she pleases
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
